videos.title: This is why Khans of Tarkir was incredible
videos.description:
A love-letter to Khans of Tarkir, a great Magic: The Gathering set with amazing cards, captivating story, and an incredible competitive format.  If they could all be bangers, they would be like Khans of Tarkir.
